mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.register_date AS regDate, m2.nickname, m2.phone_number AS phoneNumber, NVL(ms_cur.status_code, m1.status) AS statusCode, ms_cur.memo FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, memo, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1 ORDER BY m1.member_id DESC

SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.gender, m1.birthday, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image AS profilePhoto, m2.bio, m2.phone_number AS phoneNumber, m2.last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, m2.equipped_badge_id AS equippedBadgeId, NVL(ms_cur.status_code, m1.status) AS statusCode, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report r WHERE r.target_id = m1.member_id) AS reportCount, /* 포인트 잔액 — point 테이블 최신 rem_point */ NVL(( SELECT p.rem_point FROM point p WHERE p.member_id = m1.member_id ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ), 0) AS pointBalance, /* 보유 쿠폰 수 — member_coupon 중 unused 상태 */ NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.member_id = m1.member_id AND mc.status = 'AVAILABLE' ), 0) AS couponCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, memo, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1 WHERE m1.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT p.point_id AS pointId, p.member_id AS memberId, p.order_id AS orderId, p.change_reason AS changeReason, p.point_amount AS pointAmount, p.rem_point AS remPoint, TO_CHAR(p.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM point p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT mc.member_coupon_id AS memberCouponId, mc.coupon_id AS couponId, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, mc.issued_at AS issuedAt, mc.expired_at AS expiredAt, mc.status AS status FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon c ON c.coupon_id = mc.coupon_id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mc.issued_at DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_USER' THEN 1 END) AS userCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_PARTNER' THEN 1 END) AS partnerCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' THEN 1 END) AS adminCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS banCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 3 THEN 1 END) AS dormantCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 4 THEN 1 END) AS withdrawCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m1.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 END) AS todayNewCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m1.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) THEN 1 END) AS yesterdayNewCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT member_id, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 AND t.status_code = 3) AS totalDormant, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ms.member_id) FROM memberStatus ms WHERE ms.status_code = 1 AND ms.reg_date >= SYSDATE - 7 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM memberStatus ms2 WHERE ms2.member_id = ms.member_id AND ms2.status_code = 3 AND ms2.reg_date < ms.reg_date )) AS reactivatedCount FROM dual

SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.email, m2.nickname, m2.last_login_at AS lastLoginDate, ms_d.reg_date AS dormantDate, ADD_MONTHS(ms_d.reg_date, 12) AS deleteScheduledDate FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m1.member_id JOIN ( SELECT member_id, reg_date, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_d ON ms_d.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_d.rn = 1 AND ms_d.status_code = 3 ORDER BY deleteScheduledDate ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET status = #{status} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memberStatus (member_id, status_code, memo, reg_date) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{status}, #{memo}, SYSDATE)
